title: Map Requirements to Solution Components
acceptance_criteria: Each functional requirement mapped to component(s)
Each non-functional requirement mapped to component(s)
description: Create a mapping matrix that shows how each functional and non-functional requirement is met by the proposed solution components. Identify: (1) Which requirements are already satisfied by nanobot (reuse existing), (2) Which requirements require new middleware components, (3) Which requirements require new coding environment components, (4) Gaps - requirements not yet addressed, (5) Dependencies between components. Create gap analysis showing what's missing from the current design.
